title: solidago rugosa var. aspera
intro: Solidago rugosa var. aspera, also known as rough-leaved goldenrod, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family, Asteraceae, and is native to eastern Asia. The medicinal properties of Solidago rugosa var. aspera lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and soothing digestive problems. Solidago rugosa var. aspera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
